arabicText: يَا مُصَلِّي الْتَزِمْ بِأَدَبِ الْمَسْجِدِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَجْرَ فِي بُيُوتِ اللَّهِ. [1]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 1 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 1 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 1 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ جَوَارِحَكَ فِي بَيْتِ اللَّهِ فَإِنَّ الْمَسَاجِدَ لِلطَّاعَةِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ. [2]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 2 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 2 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 2 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الْخَوْضِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَبِذَلِكَ يَصِحُّ سَعْيُكَ عِنْدَ الْبَارِئِ. [3]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 3 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 3 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 3 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَعَلَيْكَ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَالذِّكْرِ خَاشِعًا لِتَنَالَ الْأَجْرَ فِي بُيُوتِ اللَّهِ. [4]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 4 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 4 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 4 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَصِلِ الصُّفُوفَ بِلَا فُرْجَةٍ فَإِنَّ الْمَسَاجِدَ لِلطَّاعَةِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ. [5]

wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 5 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 5 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 35 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 35 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاخْرُجْ مَسْتُورًا دَاعِيًا بِالْقَبُولِ وَبِذَلِكَ يَصِحُّ سَعْيُكَ عِنْدَ الْبَارِئِ. [36]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 36 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 36 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 36 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: يَا مُصَلِّي الْتَزِمْ بِأَدَبِ الْمَسْجِدِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَجْرَ فِي بُيُوتِ اللَّهِ. [37]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 37 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 37 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 37 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ جَوَارِحَكَ فِي بَيْتِ اللَّهِ فَإِنَّ الْمَسَاجِدَ لِلطَّاعَةِ وَالتَّسْبِيحِ. [38]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 38 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 38 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 38 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ

arabicText: وَاحْذَرْ مِنَ الْخَوْضِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَبِذَلِكَ يَصِحُّ سَعْيُكَ عِنْدَ الْبَارِئِ. [39]
englishTranslation: English translation of Stanza 39 outlining specialized teachings of this manuscript.
wolofTranslationStandard: Firi wers 39 ci wolof buy leral mbirum liggeey bi ca yoonu Seriñ bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِرِ وِࣺرْسْ 39 سِ وُلُفْ سِ لِيرَلْ مْبِرُمْ لِجِيرْ بِ
